intentSynonyms: create a messaging service in twilio
add a messaging service in twilio
make a new messaging service in twilio
open a new messaging service in twilio
description: Create a new messaging service for sending SMS/MMS at scale.

friendly_name.description: Friendly name for the messaging service

inbound_request_url.description: URL to receive incoming message webhooks

status_callback.description: URL to receive message status webhooks

sticky_sender.description: Whether to enable sticky sender (keeps the same sender for a recipient)
